messages.content:
翻译为中文论文语言Abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) is a multifactorial disease and a potentially lifethreatening condition. Pharmacological approaches to slow aneurysm progression and
limit the near-fatal risk of acute ruptures are currently under investigation to reduce the negative impact on the healthcare system [1]. Endovascular aortic aneurysm repair (EVAR) has
now become the standard of care which has been shown to reduce morbidity and mortality [2]. However, short-term and long-term complications still hamper procedural success,
and the most common complication is the residual perfusion of the aneurysmal sac (i.e.,
endoleak). Considering their frequency, patients undergo long-term surveillance screening
with computed tomographic angiography or vascular ultrasound, which are limited by
contrast administration or poor accuracy, respectively. Post-procedural complications and
their assessment might impact the cost-effectiveness of EVAR.

腹主动脉瘤（AAA）是一种多因素疾病，也是一种可能威胁生命的情况。药物治疗方法以减缓动脉瘤发展速度和限制急性破裂的近致命风险目前正在研究中，以减少对医疗系统的负面影响[1]。目前，内脏动脉瘤修复术（EVAR）已成为标准护理，已被证实可降低病发率和死亡率[2]。然而，短期和长期并发症仍然阻碍了程序的成功，其中最常见的并发症是动脉瘤囊内残留灌注（即端漏）。考虑到它们的发生频率，患者要接受长期的监测筛查，使用计算机断层血管造影或血管超声检查，这些方法分别受限于对比剂的使用或准确率不高。术后并发症及其评估可能影响EVAR的成本效益。

翻译为中文论文语言Abdominal aortic aneurysms (AAAs) frequently induce cardiovascular death among the elderly male population within
various European and Asian countries [1–3]. AAAs are featured by permanent expansion and weakening of a localized
abdominal aorta [4–6]. There are symptomatic, asymptomatic, and ruptured AAAs clinically [7]. As estimated by a
UK study, 1.5% of its population has an AAA greater than
30 mm in size [8]. Besides, a USA multicenter aneurysm
screening study has suggested that 4.6% of its population
aged 65-74 suffers from an AAA [9]. In Sweden, the incidence of the AAA among male population aged above 65 is
reported to be 1.8% [10]

在多个欧洲和亚洲国家，腹主动脉瘤（AAAs）经常引发老年男性人群的心血管死亡[1-3]。AAAs的特点是腹主动脉局部永久性扩张和弱化[4-6]。临床上有症状的、无症状的以及破裂的AAAs[7]。根据英国的一项研究估计，其人口中有1.5%的人患有直径大于30毫米的AAA [8]。此外，美国的一个多中心动脉瘤筛查研究表明，其65至74岁的人口中有4.6%患有AAA [9]。在瑞典，65岁以上男性人群中的AAA发生率报告为1.8% [10]。

翻译为中文论文语言Abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) is a
degenerative change in the abdominal
aorta medial layer caused by various etiologies; the layer dilates to form an aneurysm
under blood pressure, leading to permanent
dilatation of the arterial wall to more than
150% of the normal vessel diameter. AAA
is the tenth leading cause of death in elderly
men.1 Epidemiological studies have shown
that the incidence of AAA in men increases
significantly over the age of 55 years, and
the mortality rate is as high as 5.9% in the
80 to 85 year age group.2 Surgical repair, to
date, is the main therapeutic regimen, but
clinical care is hampered by the lack of etiological treatment (treatment specific to the
etiology of an individual case). Therefore, it
is of great clinical significance to find new
molecular targets involved in initiation and
progression of AAA.

腹主动脉瘤（AAA）是由多种病因引起的腹主动脉中层退行性改变；该层在血压作用下扩张形成动脉瘤，导致动脉壁永久性膨胀至正常血管直径的150%以上。AAA是老年男性死亡的第十大原因。1流行病学研究表明，男性的AAA发病率在55岁以上急剧增加，80至85岁年龄组的死亡率高达5.9%。2迄今为止，手术修复是主要的治疗方案，但由于缺乏针对个案病因的治疗（特异性病因治疗），临床护理受到阻碍。因此，寻找涉及于AAA发病和进展的新分子靶标具有重要的临床意义。

换个说法：腹主动脉腔内修复术 ( endovascular aneurysm repair，
EVAＲ) 是腹主动脉瘤最常用的术式，适用于瘤体直径＞ 5. 5
cm，有伴随症状，或者 6 个月内瘤体直径增长＞ 0. 5 cm 的患
者
腹主动脉瘤采用腔内修复术（Endovascular Aneurysm Repair, EVAR）作为其最为常见的治疗手段，该术式适宜于那些瘤体直径超过5.5厘米、存在临床症状，或在六个月内瘤体直径扩张超过0.5厘米的患者。

翻译为中文论文语言Abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) is a degenerative vascular 
disease caused by the progressive weakening and dilation of 
abdominal aorta with a diameter >3‑cm
腹主动脉瘤（AAA）是一种退行性血管疾病，由腹主动脉逐渐弱化和扩张导致，其直径超过3厘米。

翻译为中文论文语言Abdominal aortic aneurysms (AAAs) occur more frequently
in men than women (1), with the prevalence of AAAs in 65-
year-old men at 1–2%, and approximately 50% of patients
with a ruptured AAA (RAAA) die before receiving medical
treatment (2).
腹主动脉瘤（AAAs）在男性中的发生率高于女性（1），65岁男性中AAAs的患病率约为1-2%，且约有50%的破裂性腹主动脉瘤（RAAA）患者在接受医疗治疗前死亡（2）。

翻译为中文论文语言Histopathological analyses have revealed that
AAA is associated with inflammation, smooth muscle cell
(SMC) apoptosis and matrix degradation, and AAA risk factors
include age, male smoking, and low levels of high-density
lipoprotein (HDL) cholesterol (3). The role of inflammation
in AAA pathogenesis has been established. Notably, oxidative
stress increases in inflammation, playing an important role in
the pathophysiology of inflammation (4). In addition, reactive
oxygen species (ROS) play key roles in regulating matrix
metalloproteinases (MMPs) and inducing SMC apoptosis, and
ROS may also contribute to the pathogenesis of hypertension,
which is a risk factor for AAA (5).

组织病理学分析揭示，腹主动脉瘤（AAA）与炎症、平滑肌细胞（SMC）凋亡以及基质降解有关，而AAA的风险因素包括年龄、男性吸烟，以及高密度脂蛋白（HDL）胆固醇水平低（3）。炎症在AAA发病机制中的作用已经得到确认。值得注意的是，炎症中氧化应激水平升高，在炎症的病理生理学中起到重要作用（4）。此外，活性氧（ROS）在调控基质金属蛋白酶（MMPs）和诱导SMC凋亡方面发挥关键作用，ROS也可能对高血压的发病机制有所贡献，而高血压是AAA的一个风险因素（5）。

翻译为中文论文语言The most widely used
classification refers to three types of cell death in animals:
apoptosis, necroptosis, and autophagy (6). The importance of
cell death in all stages of atherosclerosis is obvious (7). For
example, the apoptosis of vascular SMCs (VSMCs) promotes
the development of AAAs (8); SMC necrotic apoptosis has been
proven to contribute to the AAA pathogenesis (9); autophagy is
related to cellular protection against inflammation and oxidative
stress, and VSMC autophagy is also involved in AAA formation
(10). In our previous studies, macrophage pyroptosis was found
to be involved in AAA (11). Therefore, in addition to the
inflammatory response, oxidative stress, extracellular matrix
degradation and other processes, many cell death modalities
play important roles in AAA progression

目前广泛使用的分类将动物细胞死亡分为三种类型：凋亡、坏死性凋亡和自噬（6）。细胞死亡在动脉粥样硬化的所有阶段里的重要性是显而易见的（7）。例如，血管平滑肌细胞（VSMCs）的凋亡促进了AAAs的发展（8）；SMC的坏死性凋亡已被证实对AAA的发病机制有贡献（9）；自噬与细胞针对炎症和氧化应激的保护有关，VSMC自噬也参与了AAA的形成（10）。在我们之前的研究中，发现巨噬细胞焦痂性坏死参与了AAA的进展（11）。因此，除了炎症反应、氧化应激、细胞外基质降解等过程外，许多细胞死亡方式在AAA的进展中起着重要作用。

翻译Microarray datasets. First, appropriate public datasets of 
human AAA were collected by using Gene Expression 
Omnibus (GEO) database in National Center of Biotechnology 
Information (http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/). Overall, three 
microarray datasets (GSE7084, GSE57691 and GSE144431) 
were included in the present study (Table SI) (17‑19). In 
GSE7084, seven AAA samples and eight healthy samples 
were involved for mRNA expression profiles by GPL2507 platform. In GSE57691, 49 AAA samples and 10 healthy 
samples were included for mRNA expression profiles using 
GPL10558 platform. In GSE144431, four AAA samples and 
four healthy samples were involved for circRNA expression 
profiles by GPL21825 platform. Principal component analysis 
(PCA) was utilized to reduce the dimension and assess the 
data availability of aforementioned datasets (20). The PCA 
score plots of dimension (Dim) 1 and 2 were visualized using 
R studio (version 4.0.3) (21). Superior group differentiation is 
demonstrated by higher Dim scores, indicating the availability 
of datasets.

微阵列数据集。首先，通过使用国家生物技术信息中心（National Center of Biotechnology Information, NCBI）的基因表达综合数据库（Gene Expression Omnibus, GEO）（http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/）收集了人类AAA的相关公共数据集。总体上，本研究纳入了三个微阵列数据集（GSE7084、GSE57691和GSE144431）（表SI）(17‑19)。在GSE7084中，涉及了七个AAA样本和八个健康样本的mRNA表达谱，使用的平台为GPL2507。在GSE57691中，包含了49个AAA样本和10个健康样本的mRNA表达谱，使用的平台为GPL10558。在GSE144431中，涉及了四个AAA样本和四个健康样本的circRNA表达谱，使用的平台为GPL21825。主成分分析（PCA）被用于降维和评估前述数据集的数据可用性（20）。第一维和第二维的PCA得分图通过R studio（版本4.0.3）（21）进行可视化。更高的维度得分表示更好的组间分离，指示着数据集的可用性。
